## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] New/changed logic has corresponding tests in `__tests__/`
- [ ] User-facing strings added to `src/constants/strings.ts`
- [ ] Dark theme colors use `COLORS` from `src/constants/colors.ts`
- [ ] Error paths use `reportError()`, not `console.log`
- [ ] Docs updated (README, API.md, ARCHITECTURE.md) if applicable
- [ ] If graduating from `src/experimental/`: removed `@experimental` tag and updated `CLAUDE.md`
